extraction.one_line_summary: ACKERMANN Pascal won a reduced bunch sprint after late crashes eliminated Gaviria, with minimal team support revealing sprint train vulnerability.
tactical_patterns: Caja Rural attempted to thin peloton for selective sprint in final kilometers, suggesting smaller teams can disrupt leadouts.
Breakaway survived until 5km remaining despite multiple sprint teams controlling, revealing coordination issues in diminished peloton.
Milan beats Pedersen at intermediate sprint to extend points lead, showing GC sprinters prioritizing jersey over stage wins.

rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: won with only Gibbons as leadout support, suggesting previous underperformance was team resource-related not form
rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: positive: nearly won bunch sprint after winning intermediate, demonstrating rare dual-threat capacity for pure sprinter
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: suffering with illness again, establishing pattern of vulnerability in three-week racing
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: survived crash on wet descent but lost key lieutenant Geoghegan Hart
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: negative: abandoned from third on GC after crash, exposing risk of wet descents midway through GT
